description: A comprehensive museum themed around natural history, highly interactive and suitable for family education.
The West Bank of the Huangpu River Ecological and Cultural Art Belt, blending natural landscapes with modern art installations, ideal for leisurely strolls.
A professional art museum named after Liu Haisu, showcasing and preserving modern Chinese art pieces.
Enjoy views of the Bund's historic architectural complex and the modern skyline of Lujiazui from the water.
A theme park commemorating the writer Lu Xun, with a serene environment suitable for morning exercises and walks.
The oldest temple in Shanghai, a thousand-year-old monastery with thriving incense offerings and blooming peach blossoms in spring.
An innovative commercial space combining shopping and art, regularly hosting contemporary art exhibitions.
A landmark building in Shanghai, an exemplary French architectural style, and a popular social media check-in spot.
A museum of ancient Chinese art, housing a rich collection of bronzes, ceramics, calligraphy, and paintings.
An arts and creative park featuring galleries, craft shops, and unique cafés.
